name: Black Forest Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain cherries well.
2. Combine cake mix, cherries, and sugar replacement in a mixing bowl.
3. Stir to blend thoroughly.
4. Spread batter in a well-greased 9-inch pan.
5. Bake at 375 degrees for 20-25 minutes.
6. Cut into 1 x 1 1/2 bars.
Food Exchange per serving: 1/4 STARCH/BREAD EXCHANGE
